name: darktracex-console
description: Local defensive cybersecurity assistant with offline knowledge and Ollama support.

scripts.check:py: python3 -m py_compile server.py bulk_audit.py train_defense_models.py generate_code_examples.py generate_attack_knowledge.py generate_attack_playbooks.py generate_ml_training_data.py generate_phishing_examples.py
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run lint:js && npm run check:py && npm run format:check
